summary: REPAIR run: Found 1 new source — HSS (Humanities and Social Sciences) Division policy on generative AI at hss.caltech.edu. This is a departmental teaching policy (not university-wide). The main caltech.edu domain remains behind Cloudflare WAF (403). Multiple DuckDuckGo searches confirmed no broader institutional GenAI/LLM/AI use policy exists publicly. Caltech's publicly discoverable AI governance is limited to: (1) admissions-specific ethics guidelines, and (2) HSS departmental teaching policy. No university-wide AI policy found. noSourceEscalationCompleted=true after exhaustive search attempts.
